core_mechanism: exact analytical solution of a Liénard-type second-order nonlinear ODE (a damped nonlinear oscillator equation) via variation of parameters with full retention of integration constants
brief_reason: The abstract's whole argument turns on correctly reducing and solving a Liénard-type equation — fixing a flawed simplification, restoring omitted integration constants, and applying variation-of-parameters properly to obtain the exact analytical solution.
